description: Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'ICU_Admission_Notifier' to handle ICU admission notifications. The channel must use a TCP Listener on port 6661 in MLLP mode for HL7 v2.x data. Configure a filter to process only messages where the patient's point of care (PV1-3.1) contains 'ICU' (case-insensitive). For matching messages, use an SMTP Sender destination named 'Email_Alert' to send notifications to icu-admin@hospital.org from alerts@hospital.org via the test SMTP server (MailHog) at mailhog:1025. The email subject must include 'ICU Admission Alert' and the body must contain the patient's name from PID-5.
